title: DfE: ministerial overseas travel, and meetings
body: "Government publishes details of ministers’ overseas travel and meetings with external individuals and organisations every quarter.  The Ministerial Code set out that from 5 July 2024 onwards, Ministers’ gifts and hospitality data will be published by the Cabinet Office as part of a central register.  Previous editions of DfE data on ministerial gifts, hospitality, travel and meetings. "
